should_trigger: Add a required validation to the email field

should_not_trigger: Why isn't my form submitting correctly — belongs to investigate (bug report)

What command should I use for this task — belongs to help (navigation)

Check for N+1 queries in the user loader — belongs to n1-check (specific analysis)
